name: Heart Code
original_name: สืบลับจับใจ
overview: After the attempted attack on a senior police officer, the Special Crime Suppression Unit launches a training camp to identify elite female officers. Among them is Captain Thara, a well-known officer who grows close to Vicky, unaware that Vicky is the daughter of the senior officer linked to her father’s death 19 years ago.

trailers.title: Final Trailer | Heart Code สืบลับจับใจ | Monomax
